evals.name: user-feedback-crud
evals.prompt: Create a complete backend module for 'User Feedback'. Requirements: 1. Define Schema (content, rating 1-5, image_url, status); 2. Implement Service layer with list, create, update methods; 3. Mount FastAPI routes with Depends injection; 4. Strictly follow UUID4 and soft-delete standards.
evals.expected_output: Standardized backend code for feedback module.

evals.name: kb-maintenance-task
evals.prompt: Implement a 'Knowledge Base Maintenance' Service. When a doc is deleted, trigger an async task to recalculate KB stats. Requirements: 1. Follow BackgroundTasks; 2. Use loguru for lifecycle logging; 3. Handle UUID and DB sessions correctly.
evals.expected_output: KB service with async maintenance task.
